title: Group Storage Export
description: Schema for group-storage.json produced by the OSRS Data Exporter RuneLite plugin.

dataType.description: Identifies this payload as a Group Ironman shared storage snapshot.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the snapshot was taken (e.g. '2026-04-21T12:00:00Z').

items.description: All non-empty item slots in the Group Ironman shared storage at the time of the snapshot.

accountContext.title: AccountContext
accountContext.description: Identifies the player account associated with this export.

accountHash.description: Stable numeric account identifier from the RuneLite client API.

characterName.description: In-game character name. May be null if the player object was not yet loaded at snapshot time.

itemEntry.title: ItemEntry
itemEntry.description: A single item in the group storage snapshot.

itemId.description: The item's unique ID as defined by the game engine.

itemName.description: The human-readable name of the item, resolved from the item composition cache.

quantity.description: The stack size / quantity of this item.

tradeable.description: Whether this item can be traded between players on the Grand Exchange or directly.

price.description: The base store price of this item in coins. High alch value = floor(price * 0.6). Low alch value = floor(price * 0.4).

oneOf.description: Inner contents of this item if it is a container (e.g. Rune Pouch, Looting Bag). Null for non-container items.
The item ID of the container this item was unpacked from. Null for top-level items.
